sEn: Mixtral 8x7B, a Sparse Mixture of Experts model, outperforms Llama 2 70B and GPT-3.5 across benchmarks with only 13B active parameters.
sZh: Mixtral 8x7B，一种稀疏混合专家模型，仅使用13B活跃参数就在各项基准测试中超越Llama 2 70B和GPT-3.5。
absEn: We introduce Mixtral 8x7B, a Sparse Mixture of Experts (SMoE) language model. Mixtral has the same architecture as Mistral 7B, with the difference that each layer is composed of 8 feedforward blocks (i.e. experts). For every token, at each layer, a router network selects two experts to process the current state and combine their outputs. Even though each token only sees two experts, the selected experts can be different at each timestep. As a result, each token has access to 47B parameters, but only uses 13B active parameters during inference. Mixtral was trained with a context size of 32k tokens and it outperforms or matches Llama 2 70B and GPT-3.5 across all evaluated benchmarks. In particular, Mixtral vastly outperforms Llama 2 70B on mathematics, code generation, and multilingual benchmarks. We also provide a model fine-tuned to follow instructions, Mixtral 8x7B - Instruct, that surpasses GPT-3.5 Turbo, Claude-2.1, Gemini Pro, and Llama 2 70B - chat model on human benchmarks. Both the base and instruct models are released under the Apache 2.0 license.
absZh: 我们介绍了Mixtral 8x7B，一种稀疏混合专家（SMoE）语言模型。Mixtral与Mistral 7B具有相同的架构，不同之处在于每一层由8个前馈块（即专家）组成。对于每个token，在每一层，一个路由网络选择两个专家来处理当前状态并组合它们的输出。尽管每个token只看到两个专家，但所选专家在每个时间步可以不同。因此，每个token可以访问47B参数，但在推理过程中仅使用13B活跃参数。Mixtral使用32k token的上下文大小进行训练，在所有评估的基准测试中均优于或匹配Llama 2 70B和GPT-3.5。特别是，Mixtral在数学、代码生成和多语言基准测试上大幅超越Llama 2 70B。我们还提供了一个经过微调以遵循指令的模型Mixtral 8x7B-Instruct，它在人类基准测试上超越了GPT-3.5 Turbo、Claude-2.1、Gemini Pro和Llama 2 70B聊天模型。基础模型和指令模型均在Apache 2.0许可下发布。

contrib.en: Introduces Mixtral 8x7B, a Sparse Mixture of Experts (SMoE) language model with 47B total parameters but only 13B active per token.
contrib.zh: 提出Mixtral 8x7B，一种稀疏专家混合（SMoE）语言模型，总参数47B但每token仅13B活跃参数。

contrib.en: Outperforms or matches Llama 2 70B and GPT-3.5 across all benchmarks, especially in math, code, and multilingual tasks.
contrib.zh: 在所有基准测试中超越或持平Llama 2 70B和GPT-3.5，尤其在数学、代码和多语言任务上。

contrib.en: Provides Mixtral 8x7B-Instruct, fine-tuned with SFT and DPO, surpassing GPT-3.5 Turbo, Claude-2.1, Gemini Pro, and Llama 2 70B chat on human evaluations.
contrib.zh: 提供经SFT和DPO微调的Mixtral 8x7B-Instruct，在人类评估中超越GPT-3.5 Turbo、Claude-2.1、Gemini Pro和Llama 2 70B聊天模型。

contrib.en: Achieves 100% passkey retrieval accuracy across context lengths up to 32k tokens, demonstrating effective long-context handling.
contrib.zh: 在32k token上下文长度内实现100%的密钥检索准确率，展示了有效的长上下文处理能力。

contrib.en: Releases both base and instruct models under Apache 2.0 license, with open-source inference stack via vLLM and Megablocks.
contrib.zh: 在Apache 2.0许可下发布基础和指令模型，通过vLLM和Megablocks提供开源推理栈。

contrib.en: Shows reduced biases on BBQ and BOLD benchmarks compared to Llama 2, with more positive sentiment profiles.
contrib.zh: 与Llama 2相比，在BBQ和BOLD基准上偏见减少，情感分布更积极。

limits.en: Memory costs are proportional to 47B sparse parameters, requiring significant GPU memory for serving.
limits.zh: 内存成本与47B稀疏参数成正比，服务时需要大量GPU内存。

limits.en: SMoE layers introduce routing overhead and increased memory loads, reducing efficiency for small batch sizes.
limits.zh: SMoE层引入路由开销和内存负载增加，小批量时效率降低。

limits.en: Expert assignment shows no clear domain specialization, limiting potential for targeted expert optimization.
limits.zh: 专家分配未显示明确的领域专业化，限制了针对性专家优化的潜力。

limits.en: High locality in expert selection may cause load imbalance in Expert Parallelism, requiring careful scheduling.
limits.zh: 专家选择的高局部性可能导致专家并行中的负载不均，需要仔细调度。

limits.en: Evaluation differences from Llama 2 paper (e.g., MBPP subset, TriviaQA without context) may affect direct comparisons.
limits.zh: 与Llama 2论文的评估差异（如MBPP子集、无上下文的TriviaQA）可能影响直接比较。

items.en: We introduce Mixtral 8x7B, a Sparse Mixture of Experts (SMoE) language model. Mixtral has the same architecture as Mistral 7B, with the difference that each layer is composed of 8 feedforward blocks (i.e. experts). For every token, at each layer, a router network selects two experts to process the current state and combine their outputs. Even though each token only sees two experts, the selected experts can be different at each timestep. As a result, each token has access to 47B parameters, but only uses 13B active parameters during inference. Mixtral was trained with a context size of 32k tokens and it outperforms or matches Llama 2 70B and GPT-3.5 across all evaluated benchmarks. In particular, Mixtral vastly outperforms Llama 2 70B on mathematics, code generation, and multilingual benchmarks. We also provide a model fine-tuned to follow instructions, Mixtral 8x7B – Instruct, that surpasses GPT-3.5 Turbo, Claude-2.1, Gemini Pro, and Llama 2 70B – chat model on human benchmarks. Both the base and instruct models are released under the Apache 2.0 license.
items.zh: 我们介绍了 Mixtral 8x7B，一种稀疏混合专家（SMoE）语言模型。Mixtral 与 Mistral 7B 具有相同的架构，区别在于每一层由 8 个前馈块（即专家）组成。对于每个 token，在每一层，一个路由网络选择两个专家来处理当前状态并组合它们的输出。尽管每个 token 只看到两个专家，但所选专家在每个时间步可以不同。因此，每个 token 可以访问 47B 参数，但在推理期间仅使用 13B 活跃参数。Mixtral 使用 32k token 的上下文窗口进行训练，在所有评估基准上优于或匹配 Llama 2 70B 和 GPT-3.5。特别是，Mixtral 在数学、代码生成和多语言基准上大幅优于 Llama 2 70B。我们还提供了一个经过微调以遵循指令的模型 Mixtral 8x7B – Instruct，它在人类基准上超越了 GPT-3.5 Turbo、Claude-2.1、Gemini Pro 和 Llama 2 70B – chat 模型。基础模型和指令模型均在 Apache 2.0 许可下发布。

items.en: Code: https://github.com/mistralai/mistral-src Webpage: https://mistral.ai/news/mixtral-of-experts/
items.zh: 代码：https://github.com/mistralai/mistral-src 网页：https://mistral.ai/news/mixtral-of-experts/

items.en: In this paper, we present Mixtral 8x7B, a sparse mixture of experts model (SMoE) with open weights, licensed under Apache 2.0. Mixtral outperforms Llama 2 70B and GPT-3.5 on most benchmarks. As it only uses a subset of its parameters for every token, Mixtral allows faster inference speed at low batch-sizes, and higher throughput at large batch-sizes.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了 Mixtral 8x7B，一种具有开放权重的稀疏混合专家模型（SMoE），基于 Apache 2.0 许可。Mixtral 在大多数基准上优于 Llama 2 70B 和 GPT-3.5。由于每个 token 仅使用其参数的一个子集，Mixtral 在低批量大小时允许更快的推理速度，在高批量大小时允许更高的吞吐量。

items.en: Mixtral is a sparse mixture-of-experts network. It is a decoder-only model where the feedforward block picks from a set of 8 distinct groups of parameters. At every layer, for every token, a router network chooses two of these groups (the “experts”) to process the token and combine their output additively. This technique increases the number of parameters of a model while controlling cost and latency, as the model only uses a fraction of the total set of parameters per token.
items.zh: Mixtral 是一种稀疏混合专家网络。它是一个仅解码器模型，其中前馈块从一组 8 个不同的参数组中选择。在每一层，对于每个 token，一个路由网络选择其中两个组（“专家”）来处理 token 并加性组合它们的输出。这种技术增加了模型的参数数量，同时控制了成本和延迟，因为模型每个 token 仅使用总参数集的一部分。

items.en: Mixtral is pretrained with multilingual data using a context size of 32k tokens. It either matches or exceeds the performance of Llama 2 70B and GPT-3.5, over several benchmarks. In particular, Mixtral demonstrates superior capabilities in mathematics, code generation, and tasks that require multilingual understanding, significantly outperforming Llama 2 70B in these domains. Experiments show that Mixtral is able to successfully retrieve information from its context window of 32k tokens, regardless of the sequence length and the location of the information in the sequence.
items.zh: Mixtral 使用 32k token 的上下文窗口在多语言数据上进行预训练。它在多个基准上匹配或超过 Llama 2 70B 和 GPT-3.5 的性能。特别是，Mixtral 在数学、代码生成和需要多语言理解的任务中表现出卓越的能力，在这些领域显著优于 Llama 2 70B。实验表明，Mixtral 能够成功地从其 32k token 的上下文窗口中检索信息，无论序列长度和信息在序列中的位置如何。

items.en: We also present Mixtral 8x7B – Instruct, a chat model fine-tuned to follow instructions using supervised fine-tuning and Direct Preference Optimization [25]. Its performance notably surpasses that of GPT-3.5 Turbo, Claude-2.1, Gemini Pro, and Llama 2 70B – chat model on human evaluation benchmarks. Mixtral – Instruct also demonstrates reduced biases, and a more balanced sentiment profile in benchmarks such as BBQ, and BOLD.
items.zh: 我们还介绍了 Mixtral 8x7B – Instruct，一个通过监督微调和直接偏好优化 [25] 进行微调以遵循指令的聊天模型。其性能在人类评估基准上显著超越了 GPT-3.5 Turbo、Claude-2.1、Gemini Pro 和 Llama 2 70B – chat 模型。Mixtral – Instruct 还展示了减少的偏见，以及在 BBQ 和 BOLD 等基准上更平衡的情感分布。

items.en: We release both Mixtral 8x7B and Mixtral 8x7B – Instruct under the Apache 2.0 license111https://mistral.ai/news/mixtral-of-experts/, free for academic and commercial usage, ensuring broad accessibility and potential for diverse applications. To enable the community to run Mixtral with a fully open-source stack, we submitted changes to the vLLM project, which integrates Megablocks CUDA kernels for efficient inference. Skypilot also allows the deployment of vLLM endpoints on any instance in the cloud.
items.zh: 我们在 Apache 2.0 许可下发布了 Mixtral 8x7B 和 Mixtral 8x7B – Instruct，免费用于学术和商业用途，确保广泛的可用性和多样化应用的潜力。为了使社区能够使用完全开源的堆栈运行 Mixtral，我们向 vLLM 项目提交了更改，该项目集成了 Megablocks CUDA 内核以实现高效推理。Skypilot 还允许在云中的任何实例上部署 vLLM 端点。

items.en: Mixtral is based on a transformer architecture [31] and uses the same modifications as described in [18], with the notable exceptions that Mixtral supports a fully dense context length of 32k tokens, and the feedforward blocks are replaced by Mixture-of-Expert layers (Section 2.1). The model architecture parameters are summarized in Table 1.
items.zh: Mixtral 基于 Transformer 架构 [31]，并使用与 [18] 中描述的相同修改，但显著例外是 Mixtral 支持完全密集的 32k token 上下文长度，并且前馈块被混合专家层替换（第 2.1 节）。模型架构参数总结在表 1 中。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Mixture of Experts Layer. Each input vector is assigned to 2 of the 8 experts by a router. The layer’s output is the weighted sum of the outputs of the two selected experts. In Mixtral, an expert is a standard feedforward block as in a vanilla transformer architecture.
items.capZh: 图 1：混合专家层。每个输入向量由路由器分配给 8 个专家中的 2 个。该层的输出是两个选定专家输出的加权和。在 Mixtral 中，专家是标准前馈块，如同在普通 Transformer 架构中一样。

items.en: We present a brief overview of the Mixture of Experts layer (Figure 1). For a more in-depth overview, see [12]. The output of the MoE module for a given input x𝑥x is determined by the weighted sum of the outputs of the expert networks, where the weights are given by the gating network’s output. i.e. given n𝑛n expert networks {E0,Ei,…,En−1}subscript𝐸0subscript𝐸𝑖…subscript𝐸𝑛1\{E_{0},E_{i},...,E_{n-1}\}, the output of the expert layer is given by:
items.zh: 我们简要概述了混合专家层（图 1）。更深入的概述请参见 [12]。对于给定输入 x，MoE 模块的输出由专家网络输出的加权和决定，其中权重由门控网络的输出给出。即，给定 n 个专家网络 {E0, Ei, ..., En-1}，专家层的输出由下式给出：

items.en: Here, G​(x)i𝐺subscript𝑥𝑖G(x)_{i} denotes the n𝑛n-dimensional output of the gating network for the i𝑖i-th expert, and Ei​(x)subscript𝐸𝑖𝑥E_{i}(x) is the output of the i𝑖i-th expert network. If the gating vector is sparse, we can avoid computing the outputs of experts whose gates are zero. There are multiple alternative ways of implementing G​(x)𝐺𝑥G(x) [6, 15, 35], but a simple and performant one is implemented by taking the softmax over the Top-K logits of a linear layer [28]. We use
items.zh: 这里，G(x)i 表示第 i 个专家的门控网络的 n 维输出，Ei(x) 是第 i 个专家网络的输出。如果门控向量是稀疏的，我们可以避免计算门控为零的专家的输出。实现 G(x) 有多种替代方法 [6, 15, 35]，但一种简单且高性能的方法是通过对线性层的 Top-K logits 取 softmax 来实现 [28]。我们使用

items.en: where (TopK​(ℓ))i:=ℓiassignsubscriptTopKℓ𝑖subscriptℓ𝑖(\text{TopK}(\ell))_{i}:=\ell_{i} if ℓisubscriptℓ𝑖\ell_{i} is among the top-K coordinates of logits ℓ∈ℝnℓsuperscriptℝ𝑛\ell\in\mathbb{R}^{n} and (TopK​(ℓ))i:=−∞assignsubscriptTopKℓ𝑖(\text{TopK}(\ell))_{i}:=-\infty otherwise. The value of K – the number of experts used per token – is a hyper-parameter that modulates the amount of compute used to process each token. If one increases n𝑛n while keeping K𝐾K fixed, one can increase the model’s parameter count while keeping its computational cost effectively constant. This motivates a distinction between the model’s total parameter count (commonly referenced as the sparse parameter count), which grows with n𝑛n, and the number of parameters used for processing an individual token (called the active parameter count), which grows with K𝐾K up to n𝑛n.
items.zh: 其中 (TopK(ℓ))i := ℓi 如果 ℓi 是 logits ℓ ∈ ℝ^n 的前 K 个坐标之一，否则 (TopK(ℓ))i := -∞。K 的值——每个 token 使用的专家数量——是一个超参数，它调节处理每个 token 所需的计算量。如果增加 n 而保持 K 固定，则可以增加模型的参数数量，同时保持其计算成本有效恒定。这促使区分模型的总参数数量（通常称为稀疏参数数量），它随 n 增长，以及处理单个 token 使用的参数数量（称为活跃参数数量），它随 K 增长直至 n。

items.en: MoE layers can be run efficiently on single GPUs with high performance specialized kernels. For example, Megablocks [13] casts the feed-forward network (FFN) operations of the MoE layer as large sparse matrix multiplications, significantly enhancing the execution speed and naturally handling cases where different experts get a variable number of tokens assigned to them. Moreover, the MoE layer can be distributed to multiple GPUs through standard Model Parallelism techniques, and through a particular kind of partitioning strategy called Expert Parallelism (EP) [28]. During the MoE layer’s execution, tokens meant to be processed by a specific expert are routed to the corresponding GPU for processing, and the expert’s output is returned to the original token location. Note that EP introduces challenges in load balancing, as it is essential to distribute the workload evenly across the GPUs to prevent overloading individual GPUs or hitting computational bottlenecks.
items.zh: MoE 层可以在单个 GPU 上使用高性能专用内核高效运行。例如，Megablocks [13] 将 MoE 层的前馈网络（FFN）操作转换为大型稀疏矩阵乘法，显著提高了执行速度，并自然处理不同专家分配不同数量 token 的情况。此外，MoE 层可以通过标准模型并行技术以及一种称为专家并行（EP）[28] 的特殊分区策略分布到多个 GPU。在 MoE 层执行期间，需要由特定专家处理的 token 被路由到相应的 GPU 进行处理，专家的输出返回到原始 token 位置。注意，EP 在负载均衡方面带来了挑战，因为必须均匀地将工作负载分布到 GPU 上，以防止单个 GPU 过载或遇到计算瓶颈。

items.en: In a Transformer model, the MoE layer is applied independently per token and replaces the feed-forward (FFN) sub-block of the transformer block. For Mixtral we use the same SwiGLU architecture as the expert function Ei​(x)subscript𝐸𝑖𝑥E_{i}(x) and set K=2𝐾2K=2. This means each token is routed to two SwiGLU sub-blocks with different sets of weights. Taking this all together, the output y𝑦y for an input token x𝑥x is computed as:
items.zh: 在 Transformer 模型中，MoE 层独立应用于每个 token，并替换 Transformer 块中的前馈（FFN）子块。对于 Mixtral，我们使用与专家函数 Ei(x) 相同的 SwiGLU 架构，并设置 K=2。这意味着每个 token 被路由到两个具有不同权重集的 SwiGLU 子块。综上所述，输入 token x 的输出 y 计算如下：

items.en: This formulation is similar to the GShard architecture [21], with the exceptions that we replace all FFN sub-blocks by MoE layers while GShard replaces every other block, and that GShard uses a more elaborate gating strategy for the second expert assigned to each token.
items.zh: 该公式类似于 GShard 架构 [21]，但不同之处在于我们将所有 FFN 子块替换为 MoE 层，而 GShard 替换每隔一个块，并且 GShard 对分配给每个 token 的第二个专家使用更复杂的门控策略。

items.en: We compare Mixtral to Llama, and re-run all benchmarks with our own evaluation pipeline for fair comparison. We measure performance on a wide variety of tasks categorized as follow:
items.zh: 我们将 Mixtral 与 Llama 进行比较，并使用我们自己的评估流程重新运行所有基准以进行公平比较。我们在各种任务上测量性能，分类如下：

items.capEn: Figure 2: Performance of Mixtral and different Llama models on a wide range of benchmarks. All models were re-evaluated on all metrics with our evaluation pipeline for accurate comparison. Mixtral outperforms or matches Llama 2 70B on all benchmarks. In particular, it is vastly superior in mathematics and code generation.
items.capZh: 图 2：Mixtral 和不同 Llama 模型在广泛基准上的性能。所有模型均使用我们的评估流程对所有指标进行了重新评估，以进行准确比较。Mixtral 在所有基准上优于或匹配 Llama 2 70B。特别是，它在数学和代码生成方面大幅领先。

items.en: Commonsense Reasoning (0-shot): Hellaswag [32], Winogrande [26], PIQA [3], SIQA [27], OpenbookQA [22], ARC-Easy, ARC-Challenge [8], CommonsenseQA [30]
items.zh: 常识推理（0-shot）：Hellaswag [32]、Winogrande [26]、PIQA [3]、SIQA [27]、OpenbookQA [22]、ARC-Easy、ARC-Challenge [8]、CommonsenseQA [30]

items.en: World Knowledge (5-shot): NaturalQuestions [20], TriviaQA [19]
items.zh: 世界知识（5-shot）：NaturalQuestions [20]、TriviaQA [19]

items.en: Reading Comprehension (0-shot): BoolQ [7], QuAC [5]
items.zh: 阅读理解（0-shot）：BoolQ [7]、QuAC [5]

items.en: Math: GSM8K [9] (8-shot) with maj@8 and MATH [17] (4-shot) with maj@4
items.zh: 数学：GSM8K [9]（8-shot）使用 maj@8 和 MATH [17]（4-shot）使用 maj@4

items.en: Code: Humaneval [4] (0-shot) and MBPP [1] (3-shot)
items.zh: 代码：Humaneval [4]（0-shot）和 MBPP [1]（3-shot）

items.en: Popular aggregated results: MMLU [16] (5-shot), BBH [29] (3-shot), and AGI Eval [34] (3-5-shot, English multiple-choice questions only)
items.zh: 流行聚合结果：MMLU [16]（5-shot）、BBH [29]（3-shot）和 AGI Eval [34]（3-5-shot，仅英文选择题）

items.en: Detailed results for Mixtral, Mistral 7B and Llama 2 7B/13B/70B and Llama 1 34B222Since Llama 2 34B was not open-sourced, we report results for Llama 1 34B. are reported in Table 2. Figure 2 compares the performance of Mixtral with the Llama models in different categories. Mixtral surpasses Llama 2 70B across most metrics. In particular, Mixtral displays a superior performance in code and mathematics benchmarks.
items.zh: Mixtral、Mistral 7B、Llama 2 7B/13B/70B 和 Llama 1 34B²²由于 Llama 2 34B 未开源，我们报告 Llama 1 34B 的结果。的详细结果见表 2。图 2 比较了 Mixtral 与 Llama 模型在不同类别中的性能。Mixtral 在大多数指标上超越了 Llama 2 70B。特别是在代码和数学基准测试中，Mixtral 表现出更优的性能。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Results on MMLU, commonsense reasoning, world knowledge and reading comprehension, math and code for Mistral (7B/8x7B) vs Llama 2 (7B/13B/70B). Mixtral largely outperforms Llama 2 70B on all benchmarks, except on reading comprehension benchmarks while using 5x lower active parameters. It is also vastly superior to Llama 2 70B on code and math.
items.capZh: 图 3：Mistral（7B/8x7B）与 Llama 2（7B/13B/70B）在 MMLU、常识推理、世界知识和阅读理解、数学和代码上的结果。Mixtral 在所有基准测试上大幅优于 Llama 2 70B，除了阅读理解基准测试，同时使用的活跃参数减少了 5 倍。在代码和数学上，Mixtral 也远优于 Llama 2 70B。

items.en: Size and Efficiency. We compare our performance to the Llama 2 family, aiming to understand Mixtral models’ efficiency in the cost-performance spectrum (see Figure 3). As a sparse Mixture-of-Experts model, Mixtral only uses 13B active parameters for each token. With 5x lower active parameters, Mixtral is able to outperform Llama 2 70B across most categories.
items.zh: 规模与效率。我们将性能与 Llama 2 系列进行比较，旨在理解 Mixtral 模型在成本-性能谱系中的效率（见图 3）。作为稀疏混合专家模型，Mixtral 每个 token 仅使用 13B 活跃参数。在活跃参数减少 5 倍的情况下，Mixtral 在大多数类别上能够超越 Llama 2 70B。

items.en: Note that this analysis focuses on the active parameter count (see Section 2.1), which is directly proportional to the inference compute cost, but does not consider the memory costs and hardware utilization. The memory costs for serving Mixtral are proportional to its sparse parameter count, 47B, which is still smaller than Llama 2 70B. As for device utilization, we note that the SMoEs layer introduces additional overhead due to the routing mechanism and due to the increased memory loads when running more than one expert per device. They are more suitable for batched workloads where one can reach a good degree of arithmetic intensity.
items.zh: 注意，此分析关注活跃参数数量（见第 2.1 节），它与推理算力成本成正比，但未考虑内存成本和硬件利用率。服务 Mixtral 的内存成本与其稀疏参数数量 47B 成正比，仍小于 Llama 2 70B。至于设备利用率，我们注意到 SMoE 层由于路由机制以及每设备运行多个专家时增加的内存负载，会引入额外开销。它们更适合批处理工作负载，因为可以达到较高的算术强度。

items.en: Comparison with Llama 2 70B and GPT-3.5. In Table 3, we report the performance of Mixtral 8x7B compared to Llama 2 70B and GPT-3.5. We observe that Mixtral performs similarly or above the two other models. On MMLU, Mixtral obtains a better performance, despite its significantly smaller capacity (47B tokens compared to 70B). For MT Bench, we report the performance of the latest GPT-3.5-Turbo model available, gpt-3.5-turbo-1106.
items.zh: 与 Llama 2 70B 和 GPT-3.5 的比较。在表 3 中，我们报告了 Mixtral 8x7B 与 Llama 2 70B 和 GPT-3.5 的性能。我们观察到 Mixtral 的表现与另外两个模型相似或更好。在 MMLU 上，Mixtral 获得了更好的性能，尽管其容量显著较小（47B token 对比 70B）。对于 MT Bench，我们报告了可用的最新 GPT-3.5-Turbo 模型 gpt-3.5-turbo-1106 的性能。

items.en: Evaluation Differences. On some benchmarks, there are some differences between our evaluation protocol and the one reported in the Llama 2 paper: 1) on MBPP, we use the hand-verified subset 2) on TriviaQA, we do not provide Wikipedia contexts.
items.zh: 评估差异。在某些基准测试上，我们的评估协议与 Llama 2 论文中报告的协议存在一些差异：1）在 MBPP 上，我们使用手工验证的子集；2）在 TriviaQA 上，我们不提供 Wikipedia 上下文。

items.en: Compared to Mistral 7B, we significantly upsample the proportion of multilingual data during pretraining. The extra capacity allows Mixtral to perform well on multilingual benchmarks while maintaining a high accuracy in English. In particular, Mixtral significantly outperforms Llama 2 70B in French, German, Spanish, and Italian, as shown in Table 4.
items.zh: 与 Mistral 7B 相比，我们在预训练期间显著上采样了多语言数据的比例。额外的容量使 Mixtral 在多语言基准测试上表现良好，同时保持英语的高准确性。特别是，Mixtral 在法语、德语、西班牙语和意大利语上显著优于 Llama 2 70B，如表 4 所示。

items.en: To assess the capabilities of Mixtral to tackle long context, we evaluate it on the passkey retrieval task introduced in [23], a synthetic task designed to measure the ability of the model to retrieve a passkey inserted randomly in a long prompt. Results in Figure 4 (Left) show that Mixtral achieves a 100% retrieval accuracy regardless of the context length or the position of passkey in the sequence. Figure 4 (Right) shows that the perplexity of Mixtral on a subset of the proof-pile dataset [2] decreases monotonically as the size of the context increases.
items.zh: 为了评估 Mixtral 处理长上下文的能力，我们在 [23] 中介绍的密码检索任务上对其进行评估，这是一个合成任务，旨在衡量模型从长提示中随机插入的密码中检索的能力。图 4（左）的结果显示，无论上下文长度或密码在序列中的位置如何，Mixtral 都能达到 100% 的检索准确率。图 4（右）显示，Mixtral 在 proof-pile 数据集 [2] 子集上的困惑度随着上下文大小的增加而单调递减。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Long range performance of Mixtral. (Left) Mixtral has 100% retrieval accuracy of the Passkey task regardless of the location of the passkey and length of the input sequence. (Right) The perplexity of Mixtral on the proof-pile dataset decreases monotonically as the context length increases.
items.capZh: 图 4：Mixtral 的长距离性能。（左）无论密码位置和输入序列长度如何，Mixtral 在密码任务上的检索准确率均为 100%。（右）Mixtral 在 proof-pile 数据集上的困惑度随着上下文长度的增加而单调递减。

items.en: To identify possible flaws to be corrected by fine-tuning / preference modeling, we measure the base model performance on Bias Benchmark for QA (BBQ) [24] and Bias in Open-Ended Language Generation Dataset (BOLD) [10]. BBQ is a dataset of hand-written question sets that target attested social biases against nine different socially-relevant categories: age, disability status, gender identity, nationality, physical appearance, race/ethnicity, religion, socio-economic status, sexual orientation. BOLD is a large-scale dataset that consists of 23,679 English text generation prompts for bias benchmarking across five domains.
items.zh: 为了识别可能通过微调/偏好建模纠正的缺陷，我们测量了基础模型在偏见基准测试（BBQ）[24] 和开放式语言生成偏见数据集（BOLD）[10] 上的性能。BBQ 是一个手工编写的问题集数据集，针对九个不同社会相关类别的既定社会偏见：年龄、残疾状况、性别认同、国籍、外貌、种族/民族、宗教、社会经济地位、性取向。BOLD 是一个大规模数据集，包含 23,679 个英文文本生成提示，用于五个领域的偏见基准测试。

items.en: We benchmark Llama 2 and Mixtral on BBQ and BOLD with our evaluation framework and report the results in Table 5. Compared to Llama 2, Mixtral presents less bias on the BBQ benchmark (56.0% vs 51.5%). For each group in BOLD, a higher average sentiment score means more positive sentiments and a lower standard deviation indicates less bias within the group. Overall, Mixtral displays more positive sentiments than Llama 2, with similar variances within each group.
items.zh: 我们使用评估框架对 Llama 2 和 Mixtral 在 BBQ 和 BOLD 上进行基准测试，并将结果报告在表 5 中。与 Llama 2 相比，Mixtral 在 BBQ 基准测试上表现出更少的偏见（56.0% 对比 51.5%）。对于 BOLD 中的每个组，更高的平均情感分数表示更积极的情感，更低的标准差表示组内偏见更少。总体而言，Mixtral 表现出比 Llama 2 更积极的情感，各组内方差相似。

items.en: We train Mixtral – Instruct using supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on an instruction dataset followed by Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) [25] on a paired feedback dataset. Mixtral – Instruct reaches a score of 8.30 on MT-Bench [33] (see Table 2), making it the best open-weights model as of December 2023. Independent human evaluation conducted by LMSys is reported in Figure 6333https://huggingface.co/spaces/lmsys/chatbot-arena-leaderboard and shows that Mixtral – Instruct outperforms GPT-3.5-Turbo, Gemini Pro, Claude-2.1, and Llama 2 70B chat.
items.zh: 我们使用监督微调（SFT）在指令数据集上训练 Mixtral – Instruct，然后使用直接偏好优化（DPO）[25] 在配对反馈数据集上进行训练。Mixtral – Instruct 在 MT-Bench [33] 上达到 8.30 分（见表 2），使其成为截至 2023 年 12 月最佳的开源权重模型。LMSys 进行的独立人工评估报告在图 6³³https://huggingface.co/spaces/lmsys/chatbot-arena-leaderboard 中，显示 Mixtral – Instruct 优于 GPT-3.5-Turbo、Gemini Pro、Claude-2.1 和 Llama 2 70B chat。

items.capEn: Figure 6: LMSys Leaderboard. (Screenshot from Dec 22, 2023) Mixtral 8x7B Instruct v0.1 achieves an Arena Elo rating of 1121 outperforming Claude-2.1 (1117), all versions of GPT-3.5-Turbo (1117 best), Gemini Pro (1111), and Llama-2-70b-chat (1077). Mixtral is currently the best open-weights model by a large margin.
items.capZh: 图 6：LMSys 排行榜。（2023 年 12 月 22 日截图）Mixtral 8x7B Instruct v0.1 的 Arena Elo 评分为 1121，优于 Claude-2.1（1117）、所有版本的 GPT-3.5-Turbo（最佳 1117）、Gemini Pro（1111）和 Llama-2-70b-chat（1077）。Mixtral 目前是大幅领先的最佳开源权重模型。

items.en: In this section, we perform a small analysis on the expert selection by the router. In particular, we are interested to see if during training some experts specialized to some specific domains (e.g. mathematics, biology, philosophy, etc.).
items.zh: 在本节中，我们对路由器选择的专家进行小规模分析。我们特别感兴趣的是，在训练过程中，某些专家是否专门针对某些特定领域（例如数学、生物学、哲学等）。

items.en: To investigate this, we measure the distribution of selected experts on different subsets of The Pile validation dataset [14]. Results are presented in Figure 7, for layers 0, 15, and 31 (layers 0 and 31 respectively being the first and the last layers of the model). Surprisingly, we do not observe obvious patterns in the assignment of experts based on the topic. For instance, at all layers, the distribution of expert assignment is very similar for ArXiv papers (written in Latex), for biology (PubMed Abstracts), and for Philosophy (PhilPapers) documents.
items.zh: 为了研究这一点，我们测量了 The Pile 验证数据集 [14] 不同子集上所选专家的分布。结果如图 7 所示，针对第 0、15 和 31 层（第 0 层和第 31 层分别是模型的第一层和最后一层）。令人惊讶的是，我们没有观察到基于主题的专家分配中的明显模式。例如，在所有层中，ArXiv 论文（用 LaTeX 编写）、生物学（PubMed 摘要）和哲学（PhilPapers）文档的专家分配分布非常相似。

items.en: Only for DM Mathematics we note a marginally different distribution of experts. This divergence is likely a consequence of the dataset’s synthetic nature and its limited coverage of the natural language spectrum, and is particularly noticeable at the first and last layers, where the hidden states are very correlated to the input and output embeddings respectively.
items.zh: 只有 DM Mathematics 数据集显示出略微不同的专家分布。这种差异很可能是该数据集的合成性质及其对自然语言谱系覆盖有限的结果，并且在第一层和最后一层尤为明显，其中隐藏状态分别与输入和输出嵌入高度相关。

items.en: This suggests that the router does exhibit some structured syntactic behavior. Figure 8 shows examples of text from different domains (Python code, mathematics, and English), where each token is highlighted with a background color corresponding to its selected expert. The figure shows that words such as ‘self’ in Python and ‘Question’ in English often get routed through the same expert even though they involve multiple tokens. Similarly, in code, the indentation tokens are always assigned to the same experts, particularly at the first and last layers where the hidden states are more correlated to the input and output of the model.
items.zh: 这表明路由器确实表现出一些结构化的句法行为。图 8 显示了来自不同领域（Python 代码、数学和英语）的文本示例，其中每个 token 都用与其所选专家对应的背景颜色突出显示。该图显示，诸如 Python 中的 'self' 和英语中的 'Question' 等单词通常通过同一个专家路由，即使它们涉及多个 token。类似地，在代码中，缩进 token 总是分配给相同的专家，尤其是在第一层和最后一层，其中隐藏状态与模型的输入和输出更相关。

items.en: We also note from Figure 8 that consecutive tokens are often assigned the same experts. In fact, we observe some degree of positional locality in The Pile datasets. Table 5 shows the proportion of consecutive tokens that get the same expert assignments per domain and layer. The proportion of repeated
items.zh: 我们还从图8中注意到，连续的词元通常被分配给相同的专家。事实上，我们在The Pile数据集中观察到一定程度的局部位置性。表5显示了每个领域和层中连续词元获得相同专家分配的比例。重复

items.capEn: Figure 7: Proportion of tokens assigned to each expert on different domains from The Pile dataset for layers 0, 15, and 31. The gray dashed vertical line marks 1/8181/8, i.e. the proportion expected with uniform sampling. Here, we consider experts that are either selected as a first or second choice by the router. A breakdown of the proportion of assignments done in each case cane be seen in Figure 9 in the Appendix.
items.capZh: 图7：来自The Pile数据集的不同领域中，第0、15和31层上分配给每个专家的词元比例。灰色虚线标记了1/8，即均匀采样下的预期比例。这里，我们考虑被路由器选为第一或第二选择的专家。每种情况下分配比例的详细情况可见附录中的图9。

items.en: consecutive assignments is significantly higher than random for higher layers. This has implications in how one might optimize the model for fast training and inference. For example, cases with high locality are more likely to cause over-subscription of certain experts when doing Expert Parallelism. Conversely, this locality can be leveraged for caching, as is done in [11]. A more complete view of these same expert frequency is provided for all layers and across datasets in Figure 10 in the Appendix.
items.zh: 连续分配的比例在较高层显著高于随机水平。这对如何优化模型以实现快速训练和推理具有启示意义。例如，高局部性的情况在进行专家并行时更可能导致某些专家的过度订阅。相反，这种局部性可用于缓存，如[11]中所述。所有层和数据集上相同专家频率的更完整视图见附录中的图10。

items.capEn: Figure 8: Text samples where each token is colored with the first expert choice. The selection of experts appears to be more aligned with the syntax rather than the domain, especially at the initial and final layers.
items.capZh: 图8：文本样本，其中每个词元用第一专家选择着色。专家的选择似乎更符合句法而非领域，尤其是在初始层和最终层。

items.en: In this paper, we introduced Mixtral 8x7B, the first mixture-of-experts network to reach a state-of-the-art performance among open-source models. Mixtral 8x7B Instruct outperforms Claude-2.1, Gemini Pro, and GPT-3.5 Turbo on human evaluation benchmarks. Because it only uses two experts at each time step, Mixtral only uses 13B active parameters per token while outperforming the previous best model using 70B parameters per token (Llama 2 70B). We are making our trained and fine-tuned models publicly available under the Apache 2.0 license. By sharing our models, we aim to facilitate the development of new techniques and applications that can benefit a wide range of industries and domains.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了Mixtral 8x7B，这是首个达到开源模型中最先进性能的混合专家网络。Mixtral 8x7B Instruct在人类评估基准上优于Claude-2.1、Gemini Pro和GPT-3.5 Turbo。由于每个时间步仅使用两个专家，Mixtral每个词元仅使用130亿活跃参数，同时优于之前每个词元使用700亿参数的最佳模型（Llama 2 70B）。我们将在Apache 2.0许可下公开提供我们训练和微调的模型。通过共享我们的模型，我们旨在促进能够惠及广泛行业和领域的新技术和应用的发展。

items.en: We thank the CoreWeave and Scaleway teams for technical support as we trained our models. We are grateful to NVIDIA for supporting us in integrating TensorRT-LLM and Triton and working alongside us to make a sparse mixture of experts compatible with TensorRT-LLM.
items.zh: 我们感谢CoreWeave和Scaleway团队在我们训练模型时提供的技术支持。我们感谢NVIDIA支持我们集成TensorRT-LLM和Triton，并与我们合作使稀疏混合专家与TensorRT-LLM兼容。
